decision_reasons: Observation is limited to cited synthetic page structure expectations.
Reviewer queue must preserve PP&D DevHub boundaries before any authenticated or consequential action.
required_stop_gates: Manual reviewer must not perform login automation, preserve session state, capture screenshots, record traces, export HAR, click through account-scoped links, upload files, submit forms, process payment, or schedule inspections.
Any mismatch becomes a new cited review note rather than an automated browser action.
rollback_notes: Remove the generated queue item from downstream review output if any attestation fails.
Rebuild from committed fixtures only after replacing the invalid synthetic evidence or gate row.

citation.quote_or_note: Home surface release decision remains manual-review-required and read-only.

decision_reasons: Observation is limited to cited synthetic permit-status expectations and does not inspect a real permit record.
Lookup, upload, fee payment, scheduling, cancellation, certification, and submission remain stop-before-action gates.
required_stop_gates: Manual reviewer must not perform login automation, preserve session state, capture screenshots, record traces, export HAR, click through account-scoped links, upload files, submit forms, process payment, or schedule inspections.
Any need for private account evidence requires attended human review outside committed fixtures.
rollback_notes: Remove the generated queue item from downstream review output if it contains real permit, address, fee, attachment, or account data.
Rebuild from committed fixtures only after the synthetic packet and gate matrix pass offline validation.

citation.quote_or_note: Permit status surface release decision remains manual-review-required and read-only.
